description: Use Eclipse to merge two versions of a Java utility class into a final version within the MergeTask project located at `~/eclipse-workspace/MergeTask/`. Following the specific rules defined in `MERGE_INSTRUCTIONS.md`, merge content from `src/main/java/com/acme/util/DataProcessor_v1.java` and `src/main/java/com/acme/util/DataProcessor_v2.java` into the target file `src/main/java/com/acme/util/DataProcessor.java`. Ensure the final `DataProcessor.java` class uses the correct package (`com.acme.util`) and class name, compiles without errors, and passes the provided `DataProcessorTest.java` JUnit test.
